case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION ON SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED BY JUDGE KEVIN RYAN #5; STAYED UNTIL 06/NOV/97, MOTION TO S/A TO BE HEARD SAME DATE FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,583.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
